message:
🐛 Detect Netlify domain for demo mode

Add hostname check for netlify.app in addition to VITE_DEMO_MODE
env var. This ensures demo mode works even if the env var isn't
properly passed during Netlify builds.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -36,9 +36,10 @@
   - ✅ Fixed kubectl action in CI (v3.2)
   - ✅ Deployed to vllm-d cluster
   - ✅ .env file support for local dev
-- **Status**: ACTIVE - planning local agent feature
+  - ✅ Netlify preview deployment setup (netlify.toml + MSW demo mode)
+- **Status**: IDLE - available for new tasks
 - **Resource locks**: none
-- **Current Work**: Local agent for kubeconfig + Claude Code bridge
+- **Current Work**: Completed Netlify setup (PR #10 + connected to Netlify)
 
 ### Instance 2: kkc
 - **Completed**:
